siteinfo.sitename: Lord of the Mysteries Fixture Wiki

revision.text:
{{Infobox pathway |name = Seer |sequence = {{seq|9}} |image = [[File:Seer.png|thumb|A [[divination]] tool]] }} <!-- editor note: keep short --> The '''Seer''' is the Sequence 9 of the [[Fool Pathway|Fool pathway]].<ref name="src"/> A Seer gains rudimentary [[divination]] abilities, including augury and dream interpretation.<ref>Web novel, early chapters.</ref>
== Abilities == * Spirit vision at close range * [[Pendulum]] dowsing * Augury performed with a [https://example.test/decks tarot deck]
{| class="wikitable" ! Sequence !! Name |- | 9 || Seer |}
== Digestion == Newly advanced Seers are advised to act out the potion’s role before any further advancement. Failure to control the corresponding desires may lead to loss of control.
__NOTOC__ [[Category:Fool Pathway]] [[Category:Sequence 9|Seer]] [[de:Seher]]
Should we merge this with the pathway page? -- Editor

[[File:Tingen.jpg|thumb|The [[canal]] at dusk]] '''Tingen''' is a city in the Loen Kingdom, known for its fog and its chapels. The city hosts a branch of the [[Nighthawks]], who police the supernatural.
Its streets run down to a slow canal. [[Category:Cities]]
